question: The scatter plot shows training hours vs. test score. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Students who trained more hours tended to achieve lower test scores.
options.B: Students who trained more hours tended to achieve higher test scores, as suggested by the larger, darker points.
options.C: There is no clear relationship between training hours and test score.
options.D: Test scores remain roughly constant regardless of training hours.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
